note:
147 HOT setups this morning out of a 356-stock universe? You gotta be kidding me. That’s nearly half the names we’re tracking on fire. If you still think this is a bear market, you're not paying attention. The market is screaming risk-on, full stop. The difference now is that it's not just tech and crypto carrying the torch anymore—there are new leaders emerging, and it’s time to listen to what the market’s trying to tell us. The rotations are happening right under our noses, and it’s up to us to capitalize.

Let’s zoom out. The macro tells me this: risk appetites are alive and well. You don’t get action like this—nearly 40% of our universe scoring 90+ on the squeeze-o-meter—if investors are running for the hills. $KRE (regional banks) at a ridiculous 98.3 daily/93.3 weekly squeeze and a bullish regime? That’s financials waking up. $XLB (materials) at 97.8 daily/85.6 weekly? That’s the industrial economy starting to breathe again. Oh, and let’s not forget $UNG (natural gas) at 97.7 daily and 88.5 weekly—do you smell the shift in energy yet? This isn’t last year; the game is changing. The bears? They’ve got nothing.

So let’s drill down into the setups that matter. First off, $KRE—regional banks are alive, folks. After a beating last year, they’re suddenly showing signs of life. $BAC is riding shotgun, squeezing at 97.4 daily, 91.8 weekly. If financials are back, it's the ultimate green light for broader risk-on moves. Then there’s $XLB—materials have been sneakily firming up, and now they’re one of the hottest spots on the board. What's the bet? Infrastructure spending, green energy, and a stabilizing commodities market. And speaking of commodities, $UNG is talking. Natural gas has been a dog for years, but when you see this kind of squeeze coiled up, it’s only a matter of time before it lets loose. Here’s your cheat code: energy isn’t done, and neither is the rotation into the real-world economy.

In the portfolio, we’ve got some heaters that are begging for another look. $CIFR has been a beast—up over 100% since our $1.10 entry, with another 170% bag on our second tranche at $0.83. And guess what? It’s STILL squeezing at 93.6 in a bullish regime. That’s your double-down signal right there. $UAMY and $MP (rare earths) are cut from the same cloth—both have been tearing it up, both sold half at 2x, and both are still squeezing above 93. If you’re late, you’re lucky—this is your chance to get involved. And don’t sleep on $UUUU (uranium); we crushed our first lot at 2x, and the 95.0 squeeze says more juice is on deck.

Today, watch for follow-through in the banks. Keep an eye on crude and natural gas—they’re telegraphing something big. And don’t ignore sectors like materials and industrials; they’re not just participating, they’re leading. That’s leadership. If you're waiting for the market to pull back, I’ll save you the suspense—it probably won’t. Let’s go.
